subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that there is no God but Him. He hath sent forth the Messengers and revealed the Books as a bounty from His presence, and He, verily, is the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انه لا اله الا هو قد ارسل الرسل و انزل الکتب فضلا من عنده و هو الحق
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
